title: Jujutsu Textures [Dark]
description: Texture Pack, whith many JJK weapons
body:
Dark JJK Texture Pack
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CUSTOM WEAPONS

Rename any weapon on an anvil to transform it into a legendary cursed tool from Jujutsu Kaisen.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SWORDS                                                                                          
   
   • "Kamutoke"                                                                                 
   • "Inverted Spear of Heaven"                                                                   
   • "Dragon Bone"                                                                                  
   • "Naginata"                                                                                            
   • "Split Soul Katana"                                                                                     
   • "Jet Black Blade"                                                                                    
   • "Slaughter Demon"                                                                                       

SPEARS                                                                                                  
   
   • "Hiten"                                                                                              

AXES                                                                                                                                                                                  
  
   • "Nanami's Cleaver"                                                                                  
   • "Crow Sorcerer Axe"                                                                            

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

INSTALLATION

1. Download the resource pack
2. Place it in your ".minecraft/resourcepacks" folder
3. Activate it in-game
4. Rename any weapon on an anvil using the exact names above

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

NOTE

This pack is designed for Minecraft 1.21.11+.
Custom models will only appear when the item is renamed exactly as listed.
Works on all weapon tiers (Wooden, Stone, Iron, Golden, Diamond, Netherite, Copper).

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CREDITS

The Models are taken from the mod Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

#Minecraft #JujutsuKaisen #ResourcePack #CursedTools #JJK
